```{r}
cat("obs_sim date range:", format(range(index(obs_sim))), "\n")

# The default run presumably used obs directly — does it include spin-up?
cat("Does obs_sim include spin-up period before cal_start?",
    min(index(obs_sim)) < cal_start, "\n")
cat("obs_sim start:", format(min(index(obs_sim))), "\n")
cat("cal_start:    ", format(cal_start), "\n")

# ── 5. Run the model both ways side by side ───────────────────────────────────
obs_input <- strip_obs(obs_sim)

# Way 1: exactly as run_model does it (with rapply copy and param setting)
cm1 <- dynatop$new(hru_test, map = mdl$map)
cm1$add_data(obs_input)
cm1$initialise()
out1 <- cm1$sim(data.frame(name="q_out", id=OUTLET_ID,
                            flux="q_sf", scale=1.0,
                            stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
                sub_step=3600)$get_output()
cat("\nWay 1 (run_model style) KGE:", kge(out1[,"q_out"], obs_q), "\n")
cm1$get_model()[[1]]$sz$parameters
cm1$get_model()[[1]]$uz$parameters
cm1$get_model()[[1]]$rz$parameters
cm1$get_model()[[1]]$sf$parameters
# Way 2: default run with unmodified mdl$hru
cm2 <- dynatop$new(mdl$hru, map = mdl$map)
cm2$add_data(obs_input)
cm2$initialise()
out2 <- cm2$sim(data.frame(name="q_out", id=OUTLET_ID,
                            flux="q_sf", scale=1.0,
                            stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
                sub_step=3600)$get_output()
cat("Way 2 (default mdl$hru) KGE:", kge(out2[,"q_out"], obs_q), "\n")
cm2$get_model()[[1]]$sz$parameters
cm2$get_model()[[1]]$uz$parameters
cm2$get_model()[[1]]$rz$parameters
cm2$get_model()[[1]]$sf$parameters
# If Way 1 ≠ Way 2, the parameter or init setting is the cause
# If both ≠ 0.27, the obs_input or output definition is the cause
```

# PARAMETERIZE

```{r param attempt 3}
# =============================================================================
# dynatop GLUE Calibration — revised framework
# Key changes:
#   1. Spin-up period added before cal_start
#   2. Log-uniform LHS for wide-range parameters
#   3. Realistic bounds (c_sf and t_0 lowered, v_ch allowed to vary)
#   4. s_rz_0 initialized as fraction of s_rzmax (channels no longer blow up)
#   5. m explicitly set for channel HRUs
#   6. Two-stage GLUE:  Stage 1 = screen on KGE only to tighten bounds
#                       Stage 2 = focused GLUE with PA + strict KGE
#   7. Optional: include q_sz at outlet to check structural mass balance
# =============================================================================

# =============================================================================
# 1. LOAD MODEL AND DATA
# =============================================================================
# mdl <- readRDS(file.path(".", "hb_data", "dynaGIS", "atb_20.rds"))
# obs <- readRDS(file.path(".", "processed", "obs.rds"))

# -- Windows ------------------------------------------------------------------
SPIN_DAYS    <- 90                    # spin-up length before cal_start
cal_start    <- as.POSIXct(start, tz = "UTC")
cal_end      <- as.POSIXct(end, tz = "UTC")
sim_start    <- cal_start - SPIN_DAYS*24

obs_sim      <- obs[index(obs) >= sim_start & index(obs) <= cal_end, ]
obs_eval     <- obs[index(obs) >= cal_start & index(obs) <= cal_end, ]
obs_q        <- obs_eval[, "Discharge_m3_s"]   # keep as xts for time alignment

# -- Confirm outlet HRU --------------------------------------------------------
for(ii in seq_along(mdl$hru)){
  h <- mdl$hru[[ii]]
  if(length(h$sf_flow_direction$id) == 0 & length(h$sz_flow_direction$id) == 0)
    cat("Outlet HRU id:", h$id, "| is channel:", !is.na(h$class$endNode), "\n")
}
OUTLET_ID <- 0L

# =============================================================================
# 2. FLOW PRESENCE/ABSENCE OBSERVATIONS
# =============================================================================
#all_24 <- read_csv("/Users/johnmorgan/Documents/VT Research/HBTopModel/STIC_Synthesis/02_BinaryMatrix/Binary_hb_w3.csv")
all_24 <- read_csv("/Users/johnmorgan/Documents/VT Research/HBTopModel/STIC_Synthesis/all_24.csv") %>% 
  filter(wshed == "W3") %>% 
  select(datetime, wetdry, number, lat, long) %>% 
  filter(number %in% sensor_hru_key$sensor_id)



all_23 <- read_csv("/Users/johnmorgan/Documents/VT Research/HBTopModel/STIC_Synthesis/all_23.csv") %>% 
  filter(wshed == "W3") %>% 
  select(datetime, wetdry, ID, lat, long) %>% 
  rename(number = ID) %>% 
  filter(number %in% sensor_hru_key$sensor_id)



stic_locs <- all_23 %>% 
  bind_rows(all_24) %>%
  select(number, lat, long) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  vect(geom = c("long", "lat"), crs = "EPSG:4326") %>%
  project("EPSG:26919")

all_out <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(stic_locs)), function(i){
  dist_table <- distance(stic_locs[i,], vect_final)
  idx        <- which.min(dist_table)[1]
  data.frame(ID         = stic_locs[i,]$number,
             channel_ID = vect_final[idx,]$name,
             dist       = min(dist_table))
}))

chosen <- all_out %>% filter(dist <= 30)
# pa_obs <- all_24 %>%
#   filter(wshed == "W3", number %in% sensor_hru_map$sensor_id) %>%
#   left_join(sensor_hru_map, by = c("number" = "sensor_id")) %>%
#   mutate(hru_id = hru_id, ...)
#sensor_hru_map$sensor_id <- as.numeric(sensor_hru_map$sensor_id)
sensor_hru_key
pa_obs <- 
  all_23 %>% 
  bind_rows(all_24) %>%
  filter(number %in% sensor_hru_key$sensor_id) %>%
  select(datetime, number, wetdry) %>%
  rename(ID = number) %>%
  left_join(sensor_hru_key, by = c("ID" = "sensor_id")) %>%
  #left_join(chosen, by = "ID", relationship = "many-to-one") %>%
  mutate(
    observed = as.integer(case_when(wetdry == "wet" ~ 1, wetdry == "dry" ~ 0)),
    datetime = as.POSIXct(datetime, tz = "UTC")
  ) %>%
  select(hru_id, datetime, observed) %>%
  filter(datetime >= cal_start, datetime <= cal_end,
         !is.na(hru_id), !is.na(observed))

cat("PA sites:", sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id)), "\n")
cat("PA obs:", nrow(pa_obs), "| flowing:", sum(pa_obs$observed == 1),
    "| dry:", sum(pa_obs$observed == 0), "\n")

# Threshold for simulated "flowing" (m3/s). Adjust after Stage 1 diagnostics.
FLOW_THRESHOLD <- 1e-4   # 0.1 L/s is more defensible than 1e-8 for small streams

# =============================================================================
# 3. PARAMETER SPACE (Modified for 3 soil groups)
# =============================================================================
param_bounds <- data.frame(
  name  = c("t_0_1", "t_0_2", "t_0_3", 
            "m_1",   "m_2",   "m_3",   
            "t_d_1", "t_d_2", "t_d_3", 
            "s_rzmax", "c_sf", "T_T", "C_f"),
            
  # Lower bounds
  lower = c(0.5,   0.1,   0.01,   # t_0: Group 1 (high), Group 2 (mod), Group 3 (low)
            0.01,  0.02,  0.001,  # m:   Group 1 (mod), Group 2 (high/deep), Group 3 (low/shallow)
            3600,  43200, 3600,   # t_d: Group 1 (fast), Group 2 (slow), Group 3 (very fast)
            0.03,  0.01, -2.0,  0.1), # Other parameters (from original framework)
            
  # Upper bounds
  upper = c(5.0,   1.0,   0.5,    # t_0 
            0.03,  0.05,  0.01,   # m   
            28800, 172800,14400,  # t_d 
            0.3,   0.5,   2.0,  5.0), # Other parameters
            
  # Log-uniform sampling flags
  log   = c(TRUE,  TRUE,  TRUE,   # t_0 (usually spans orders of magnitude)
            FALSE, FALSE, FALSE,  # m (usually sampled uniformly within its narrow range)
            TRUE,  TRUE,  TRUE,   # t_d (spans orders of magnitude)
            FALSE, TRUE,  FALSE, TRUE),
            
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

n_params <- nrow(param_bounds)

strip_obs <- function(obs_xts){
  drop <- c("Discharge_m3_s", "Discharge_ls", "Discharge")
  keep <- !(names(obs_xts) %in% drop)
  obs_xts[, keep]
}

# =============================================================================
# 4. MODEL RUNNER (Modified)
# =============================================================================
run_model <- function(params,
                      mdl_template,
                      obs,
                      outlet_id  = 0L,
                      pa_hru_ids = sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id)),
                      sub_step   = 3600,
                      include_sz = FALSE){        
  
  hru <- rapply(mdl_template$hru, function(x) x, how = "replace")
  obs_input  <- strip_obs(obs)
  total_area <- sum(sapply(hru, function(h) h$properties["area"]))
  
  q_init <- as.numeric(na.omit(obs$Discharge_m3_s))[1]
  if(!is.finite(q_init) || q_init <= 0) q_init <- 1e-5
  
  # --- CONSTANTS ---
  CONSTANT_V_CH <- 1.0  # Adjust your fixed channel velocity here
  CONSTANT_N_CH <- 0.05 # Adjust your fixed Manning's n (if using kinematic)
  CONSTANT_C_WH <- 0.2  # Adjust your fixed water holding capacity
  
  for(ii in seq_along(hru)){
    is_channel <- isTRUE(!is.na(hru[[ii]]$class$endNode))
    
    if(!is_channel){
      # Fetch the soil index (1, 2, or 3) from the map generated earlier
      s_idx <- hru_soil_map$soil_idx[hru_soil_map$hru_index == ii]
      
      hru[[ii]]$sz$parameters["t_0"]     <- params[paste0("t_0_", s_idx)]
      hru[[ii]]$sz$parameters["m"]       <- params[paste0("m_", s_idx)]
      hru[[ii]]$uz$parameters["t_d"]     <- params[paste0("t_d_", s_idx)]
      hru[[ii]]$rz$parameters["s_rzmax"] <- params["s_rzmax"]
      
      if(hru[[ii]]$sf$type == "cnst"){
        hru[[ii]]$sf$parameters["c_sf"]  <- params["c_sf"]
      }
    } else {
      hru[[ii]]$sz$parameters["t_0"]     <- 0.001
      hru[[ii]]$sz$parameters["m"]       <- 0.001        
      hru[[ii]]$rz$parameters["s_rzmax"] <- 0.001
      
      # Apply Constants
      if(hru[[ii]]$sf$type == "cnst"){
        hru[[ii]]$sf$parameters["c_sf"]  <- CONSTANT_V_CH
      } else if(hru[[ii]]$sf$type == "kin"){
        hru[[ii]]$sf$parameters["n"]     <- CONSTANT_N_CH
        hru[[ii]]$sf$parameters["t_raf"] <- 999.9
        hru[[ii]]$sf$parameters["s_raf"] <- 0
      }
    }
    
    # Snow parameters (C_wh is constant)
    hru[[ii]]$snow$parameters["T_T"]  <- params["T_T"]
    hru[[ii]]$snow$parameters["C_f"]  <- params["C_f"]
    hru[[ii]]$snow$parameters["C_wh"] <- CONSTANT_C_WH
    
    # Initial conditions
    s_rzmax_val <- if(!is_channel) as.numeric(params["s_rzmax"]) else 0.001
    hru[[ii]]$initialisation["s_rz_0"]    <- min(0.5 * s_rzmax_val, 0.3)
    hru[[ii]]$initialisation["r_uz_sz_0"] <- q_init / total_area
    
    if("s_sz_0" %in% names(hru[[ii]]$initialisation)){
      hru[[ii]]$initialisation["s_sz_0"] <- 0.001
    }
  }
  
  pa_ids <- unique(pa_hru_ids)
  out_rows <- data.frame(
    name  = c("q_out", if(include_sz) "q_out_sz", paste0("q_sf_hru", pa_ids)),
    id    = c(outlet_id, if(include_sz) outlet_id, pa_ids),
    flux  = c("q_sf", if(include_sz) "q_sz", rep("q_sf", length(pa_ids))),
    scale = 1.0,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  result <- tryCatch({
    cm <- dynatop$new(hru, map = mdl_template$map)
    cm$add_data(obs_input)
    cm$initialise()
    cm$sim(out_rows, sub_step = sub_step)$get_output()
  }, error = function(e){
    warning("run_model error: ", conditionMessage(e))
    NULL
  })
  return(result)
}

# =============================================================================
# 5. DIAGNOSTIC (revised)
# =============================================================================
run_diagnostic <- function(mdl, obs_sim, obs_eval, pa_obs,
                           outlet_id = 0L, sub_step = 900, include_sz = FALSE){
  
  obs_input <- strip_obs(obs_sim)
  nms <- c("q_sf_out", "s_sf_out", "s_sz_out", "q_sz_out")
  if(include_sz) nms <- c(nms, "q_total_out")
  
  diag_rows <- data.frame(
    name  = c("q_sf_out", "s_sf_out", "s_sz_out", "q_sz_out"),
    id    = outlet_id,
    flux  = c("q_sf", "s_sf", "s_sz", "q_sz"),
    scale = 1.0,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  cm <- dynatop$new(mdl$hru, map = mdl$map)
  cm$add_data(obs_input)
  cm$initialise()
  diag_out <- cm$sim(diag_rows, sub_step = sub_step)$get_output()
  
  # Evaluate only over cal window
  eval_idx <- index(diag_out) >= index(obs_eval)[1] & index(diag_out) <= tail(index(obs_eval),1)
  q_sf_win <- diag_out[eval_idx, "q_sf_out"]
  q_sz_win <- diag_out[eval_idx, "q_sz_out"]
  
  q_tot <- if(include_sz) q_sf_win + q_sz_win else q_sf_win
  
  cat("=== Diagnostics (evaluation window) ===\n")
  cat("q_sf range (m3/s):", signif(range(as.numeric(q_sf_win)), 3), "\n")
  if(include_sz) cat("q_sz range (m3/s):", signif(range(as.numeric(q_sz_win)), 3), "\n")
  cat("Sim Total range  :", signif(range(as.numeric(q_tot)), 3), "\n")
  cat("obs_q range      :", signif(range(as.numeric(obs_eval$Discharge_m3_s), na.rm=TRUE), 3), "\n")
  cat("Bias (sim/obs)   :", signif(mean(q_tot, na.rm=TRUE)/mean(obs_eval$Discharge_m3_s, na.rm=TRUE), 3), "\n")
  
  s_sf_vals <- as.numeric(diag_out[,"s_sf_out"])
  if(tail(s_sf_vals,1) > 10 * s_sf_vals[1] + 1){
    cat("WARNING: s_sf growing unboundedly.\n")
  } else {
    cat("s_sf appears stable.\n")
  }
  
  # PA quick look
  pa_ids <- sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id))
  pa_rows <- data.frame(
    name  = paste0("q_sf_hru", pa_ids),
    id    = pa_ids,
    flux  = "q_sf",
    scale = 1.0,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  cm2 <- dynatop$new(mdl$hru, map = mdl$map)
  cm2$add_data(obs_input)
  cm2$initialise()
  pa_out <- cm2$sim(pa_rows, sub_step = sub_step)$get_output()
  
  cat("\n=== PA site q_sf (during eval window) ===\n")
  for(hid in pa_ids){
    col <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
    sub <- pa_obs[pa_obs$hru_id == hid & pa_obs$observed == 1, ]
    if(nrow(sub) == 0 || !(col %in% names(pa_out))) next
    win <- pa_out[index(pa_out) >= cal_start & index(pa_out) <= cal_end, col]
    cat(sprintf("HRU %d | min=%.2e max=%.2e (obs flow n=%d)\n",
                hid, min(win, na.rm=TRUE), max(win, na.rm=TRUE), nrow(sub)))
  }
  invisible(list(diag_out = diag_out, pa_out = pa_out))
}

cat("Running diagnostic with template defaults (include_sz = TRUE)...\n")
Sys.time()
diag <- run_diagnostic(mdl, obs_sim, obs_eval, pa_obs,
                       outlet_id = OUTLET_ID, include_sz = TRUE)
Sys.time()
# After seeing diagnostics, set this to TRUE if q_sz is a major part of discharge
INCLUDE_SZ_AT_OUTLET <- FALSE

# =============================================================================
# 6. OBJECTIVE FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================
kge <- function(sim, obs){
  both  <- merge(sim, obs, join = "inner")
  s     <- as.numeric(both[, 1])
  o     <- as.numeric(both[, 2])
  valid <- is.finite(s) & is.finite(o) & abs(s) < 1e4
  if(sum(valid) < 10) return(-Inf)
  s <- s[valid]; o <- o[valid]
  r <- cor(s, o); if(!is.finite(r)) return(-Inf)
  a <- sd(s) / sd(o)
  b <- mean(s) / mean(o)
  1 - sqrt((r - 1)^2 + (a - 1)^2 + (b - 1)^2)
}

bias_ratio <- function(sim, obs){
  both <- merge(sim, obs, join = "inner")
  mean(as.numeric(both[,1]), na.rm=TRUE) / mean(as.numeric(both[,2]), na.rm=TRUE)
}

csi_presence_absence <- function(sim_output, pa_obs, threshold = FLOW_THRESHOLD){
  TP <- FP <- FN <- TN <- 0L
  for(hid in unique(pa_obs$hru_id)){
    col_name <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
    if(!col_name %in% names(sim_output)) next
    sub_obs <- pa_obs[pa_obs$hru_id == hid, ]
    if(nrow(sub_obs) == 0) next
    sub_xts <- xts(sub_obs$observed, order.by = as.POSIXct(sub_obs$datetime, tz = "UTC"))
    both    <- merge(sim_output[, col_name], sub_xts, join = "inner")
    if(nrow(both) == 0) next
    sim_bin <- as.integer(as.numeric(both[, 1]) >= threshold)
    obs_bin <- as.integer(as.numeric(both[, 2]))
    valid   <- !is.na(sim_bin) & !is.na(obs_bin)
    sim_bin <- sim_bin[valid]; obs_bin <- obs_bin[valid]
    if(length(sim_bin) == 0) next
    TP <- TP + sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 1L)
    FP <- FP + sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 0L)
    FN <- FN + sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 1L)
    TN <- TN + sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 0L)
  }
  denom <- TP + FP + FN
  if(denom == 0) return(NULL)
  list(
    CSI = TP / denom,
    #CSI = if((TP+FP+FN+TN)>0) (TP+TN)/(TP+FP+FN+TN) else 0,
    POD = if((TP+FN)>0) TP/(TP+FN) else 0,
    FAR = if((TP+FP)>0) FP/(TP+FP) else 0,
    F1  = if((2*TP+FP+FN)>0) 2*TP/(2*TP+FP+FN) else 0,
    accuracy = if((TP+FP+FN+TN)>0) (TP+TN)/(TP+FP+FN+TN) else 0,
    TP=TP, FP=FP, FN=FN, TN=TN
  )
}

# =============================================================================
# 7. GLUE INFRASTRUCTURE
# =============================================================================
W_KGE <- 0.5
W_CSI <- 0.5
CSI_THRESHOLD <- 0.0

glue_likelihood <- function(kge_val, csi_val, kge_thresh){
  if(!is.finite(kge_val) || kge_val < kge_thresh) return(0)
  if(!is.finite(csi_val) || csi_val < CSI_THRESHOLD) return(0)
  kge_scaled <- (kge_val - kge_thresh) / (1 - kge_thresh)
  csi_scaled <- csi_val
  L_kge <- if(W_KGE > 0) kge_scaled ^ W_KGE else 1
  L_csi <- if(W_CSI > 0) csi_scaled ^ W_CSI else 1
  L_kge * L_csi
}

# Vectorized parameter sampler
generate_lhs <- function(n_samp, pb){
  d <- randomLHS(n_samp, nrow(pb))
  M <- matrix(NA, nrow=n_samp, ncol=nrow(pb))
  colnames(M) <- pb$name
  for(i in seq_len(nrow(pb))){
    lo <- pb$lower[i]; up <- pb$upper[i]
    if(pb$log[i]){
      loglo <- log10(lo); logup <- log10(up)
      M[,i] <- 10^(d[,i]*(logup - loglo) + loglo)
    } else {
      M[,i] <- d[,i]*(up - lo) + lo
    }
  }
  M
}

# Generic GLUE evaluator
glue_eval <- function(param_vec,
                      include_sz = FALSE,
                      use_pa     = TRUE,
                      kge_thresh = 0.0){
  
  params <- setNames(param_vec, param_bounds$name)
  
  # Hard guards for multiple soil groups
  if(any(params[c("t_d_1", "t_d_2", "t_d_3")] < 900)) return(list(L=0, kge=NA, csi=NA, bias=NA))
  if(params["s_rzmax"] <= 0)  return(list(L=0, kge=NA, csi=NA, bias=NA))
  
  sim <- run_model(params, mdl_template, obs_sim,
                   outlet_id  = OUTLET_ID,
                   pa_hru_ids = sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id)),
                   include_sz = include_sz)
  
  if(is.null(sim)) return(list(L=0, kge=NA, csi=NA, bias=NA))
  
  # Outlet discharge (xts, full length incl. spinup; merge with obs_q auto-subsets)
  sim_q <- if(include_sz && "q_out_sz" %in% names(sim)){
    sim[,"q_out"] + sim[,"q_out_sz"]
  } else {
    sim[,"q_out"]
  }
  
  if(any(!is.finite(sim_q))) return(list(L=0, kge=NA, csi=NA, bias=NA))
  
  kge_val   <- kge(sim_q, obs_q)
  bias_val  <- bias_ratio(sim_q, obs_q)
  pa_scores <- if(use_pa) csi_presence_absence(sim, pa_obs) else NULL
  csi_val   <- if(!is.null(pa_scores) && is.finite(pa_scores$CSI)) pa_scores$CSI else 0
  #accuracy <- if(!is.null(pa_scores) && is.finite(pa_scores$accuracy)) pa_scores$accuracy else 0
  
  # Inside glue_eval, replace the single L <- ... line with:
  if(!use_pa){
    # Screening: pure KGE ranking, ignore CSI
    if(!is.finite(kge_val) || kge_val < kge_thresh){
      L <- 0
    } else {
      L <- ((kge_val - kge_thresh) / (1 - kge_thresh)) ^ W_KGE
    }
  } else {
    L <- glue_likelihood(kge_val, csi_val, kge_thresh)
  }
  list(L = L, kge = kge_val, csi = csi_val, bias = bias_val)
}

run_glue <- function(n_samples,
                     param_bounds,
                     mdl_template,
                     obs_sim,
                     obs_q,
                     pa_obs,
                     outlet_id    = 0L,
                     n_cores      = 1L,
                     seed         = 42L,
                     use_pa       = TRUE,
                     kge_thresh   = 0.0,
                     include_sz   = FALSE,
                     sub_step     = 900){
  
  set.seed(seed)
  n_params <- nrow(param_bounds)
  param_matrix <- generate_lhs(n_samples, param_bounds)
  
  cat(sprintf("Running %d GLUE samples (%s) on %d core(s)...\n",
              n_samples,
              if(use_pa) "KGE+CSI" else "KGE only",
              n_cores))
  
  # Local wrapper so that parApply/exporting is clean
  obj_wrap <- function(v){
    glue_eval(v,
              include_sz = include_sz,
              use_pa     = use_pa,
              kge_thresh = kge_thresh)
  }
  
  if(n_cores > 1L){
    cl <- makeCluster(n_cores)
    on.exit(stopCluster(cl), add = TRUE)
    clusterExport(cl,
      c("mdl_template","obs_sim","obs_q","pa_obs","param_bounds",
        "OUTLET_ID","FLOW_THRESHOLD","W_KGE","W_CSI","CSI_THRESHOLD",
        "run_model","strip_obs","kge","bias_ratio","csi_presence_absence",
        "glue_likelihood","glue_eval","generate_lhs", "hru_soil_map"),
      envir = environment())
    clusterEvalQ(cl, { library(dynatop); library(xts) })
    score_list <- parApply(cl, param_matrix, 1, obj_wrap)
  } else {
    score_list <- apply(param_matrix, 1, obj_wrap)
  }
  
  results <- data.frame(
    param_matrix,
    L    = sapply(score_list, `[[`, "L"),
    kge  = sapply(score_list, `[[`, "kge"),
    csi  = sapply(score_list, `[[`, "csi"),
    bias = sapply(score_list, `[[`, "bias")
  )
  
  n_behav <- sum(results$L > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("Behavioural: %d / %d (%.1f%%) | Best KGE: %.3f\n",
              n_behav, n_samples, 100*n_behav/n_samples,
              max(results$kge, na.rm=TRUE)))
  
  if(n_behav == 0)
    cat("No behavioural runs — try lowering kge_thresh or check run_model.\n")
  
  results$L_norm <- if(sum(results$L, na.rm=TRUE) > 0){
    results$L / sum(results$L, na.rm=TRUE)
  } else NA_real_
  
  results[order(-results$L), ]
}

# =============================================================================
# 8. UNCERTAINTY BOUNDS (unchanged logic, accepts include_sz via run_model)
# =============================================================================
glue_uncertainty_bounds <- function(glue_results, param_bounds,
                                    mdl_template, obs_sim, obs_q,
                                    outlet_id = 0L,
                                    quantiles = c(0.05, 0.95),
                                    include_sz = FALSE){
  
  behav <- glue_results[glue_results$L > 0 & !is.na(glue_results$L), ]
  if(nrow(behav) == 0) stop("No behavioural runs.")
  cat(sprintf("Bounds from %d behavioural runs...\n", nrow(behav)))
  
  sim_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(behav)), function(i){
    p <- setNames(as.numeric(behav[i, param_bounds$name]), param_bounds$name)
    s <- run_model(p, mdl_template, obs_sim, outlet_id,
                   include_sz = include_sz)
    if(is.null(s)) return(NULL)
    q <- if(include_sz && "q_out_sz" %in% names(s)) s[,"q_out"] + s[,"q_out_sz"] else s[,"q_out"]
    as.numeric(q)
  })
  
  good  <- !sapply(sim_list, is.null)
  sims  <- sim_list[good]
  L_w   <- behav$L_norm[good]
  L_w   <- L_w / sum(L_w)
  
  sim_mat <- do.call(cbind, sims)
  # align with obs_q (just in case spinup mismatched length)
  nobs <- length(na.omit(as.numeric(obs_q)))
  if(nrow(sim_mat) != nobs){
    # attempt to trim to evaluation window index length
    sim_mat <- sim_mat[(nrow(sim_mat)-nobs+1):nrow(sim_mat), , drop=FALSE]
  }
  
  bounds <- data.frame(
    datetime = index(obs_q),
    q_obs    = as.numeric(obs_q),
    q_best   = sim_mat[, which.max(L_w)],
    q_mean   = apply(sim_mat, 1, weighted.mean, w = L_w)
  )
  for(q in quantiles){
    col <- paste0("q_", sprintf("%02d", round(q*100)))
    bounds[[col]] <- apply(sim_mat, 1, function(row){
      ord <- order(row); cw <- cumsum(L_w[ord])
      row[ord][which(cw >= q)[1]]
    })
  }
  bounds
}

# Plotting functions (keep originals, just pass result)
plot_glue_bounds <- function(bounds){
  t_idx <- bounds$datetime
  y_max <- max(c(bounds$q_obs, bounds$q_95), na.rm=TRUE)*1.1
  plot(t_idx, bounds$q_obs, type="l", col="black", lwd=1.5,
       ylim=c(0, y_max), main="GLUE bounds vs observed [m3/s]", xlab="", ylab="m3/s")
  polygon(c(t_idx, rev(t_idx)), c(bounds$q_05, rev(bounds$q_95)),
          col=adjustcolor("steelblue", alpha.f=0.3), border=NA)
  lines(t_idx, bounds$q_best, col="firebrick", lwd=1.5)
  lines(t_idx, bounds$q_mean, col="steelblue", lwd=1, lty=2)
  legend("topright", legend=c("Obs","Best","Mean","5-95%"),
         col=c("black","firebrick","steelblue",adjustcolor("steelblue",0.4)),
         lwd=c(1.5,1.5,1,8), lty=c(1,1,2,1))
}

plot_glue_dotty <- function(glue_results, param_bounds){
  behav    <- glue_results[glue_results$L > 0 & !is.na(glue_results$L), ]
  nonbehav <- glue_results[is.na(glue_results$L) | glue_results$L == 0, ]
  n_plots  <- nrow(param_bounds)
  nr <- ceiling(sqrt(n_plots)); nc <- ceiling(n_plots/nr)
  par(mfrow=c(nr,nc))
  for(pn in param_bounds$name){
    y_max <- if(nrow(behav)>0) max(behav$L, na.rm=TRUE) else 1
    xlim  <- c(param_bounds$lower[param_bounds$name==pn],
               param_bounds$upper[param_bounds$name==pn])
    if(nrow(nonbehav)>0)
      plot(nonbehav[[pn]], nonbehav$L, xlab=pn, ylab="Likelihood",
           pch=16, cex=0.4, col="grey70", ylim=c(0.3,y_max), xlim=xlim)
    else
      plot(0,0, xlab=pn, ylab="Likelihood", ylim=c(0.3,y_max), xlim=xlim, type="n")
    if(nrow(behav)>0)
      points(behav[[pn]], behav$L, pch=16, cex=0.7, col="firebrick")
    abline(h=0, lty=2, col="grey50")
  }
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
}

# Helper: tighten bounds from behavioral percentile + margin
tighten_bounds <- function(pb, runs, prob = c(0.02, 0.98), pad = 1.2){
  pb2 <- pb
  for(i in seq_len(nrow(pb))){
    nm <- pb$name[i]
    vals <- runs[[nm]]
    if(length(vals) < 5) next
    q <- quantile(vals, probs = prob, na.rm = TRUE)
    if(pb$log[i]){
      lo <- q[1] / pad
      up <- q[2] * pad
    } else {
      w  <- (q[2] - q[1]) * (pad - 1)/2
      lo <- q[1] - w
      up <- q[2] + w
    }
    pb2$lower[i] <- max(pb2$lower[i], lo)
    pb2$upper[i] <- min(pb2$upper[i], up)
    if(pb2$log[i]) pb2$lower[i] <- max(pb2$lower[i], 1e-7)
  }
  pb2
}

# =============================================================================
# 9. RUN — Two-stage GLUE
# =============================================================================
mdl_template <<- mdl
outlet_id    <<- OUTLET_ID


# -- Stage 1: Wide screen on discharge only -----------------------------------
cat("\n============= STAGE 1: DISCHARGE SCREENING =============\n")
Sys.time()
screen_results <- run_glue(
  n_samples    = 2000,          # 3k cheap runs to find the sweet spot
  param_bounds = param_bounds,
  mdl_template = mdl,
  obs_sim      = obs_sim,
  obs_q        = obs_q,
  pa_obs       = pa_obs,
  outlet_id    = OUTLET_ID,
  n_cores      = 7L,
  seed         = 236L,
  use_pa       = FALSE,         # ignore PA for now
  kge_thresh   = -0.4,          # permissive but not garbage
  include_sz   = FALSE
)
Sys.time()
saveRDS(screen_results, "./glue_results_soils/glue_screen2000_seed236.rds")


cat("\nTop 10 Stage-2 behavioral runs:\n")
best <- screen_results %>% 
  tibble() %>% 
arrange(desc(kge))

best_params <- setNames(as.numeric(best[1, param_bounds$name]), param_bounds$name)
best_sim <- run_model(best_params, mdl, obs_sim,
                      outlet_id  = OUTLET_ID,
                      pa_hru_ids = sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id)),
                      include_sz = FALSE)
plot(best_sim$q_out)

######## second round
# Extract winner
winner <- screen_results[which.max(screen_results$kge), ]
winner_params <- setNames(as.numeric(winner[, param_bounds$name]), param_bounds$name)
best_params
# Focused bounds around the sweet spot (±1 order of magnitude for logs, ±2× for linear)
param_bounds_focused <- data.frame(
  name  = c("t_0","m","t_d","s_rzmax","c_sf","n_ch","v_ch","T_T","C_f","C_wh"),
  lower = c(0.03,   0.001,  1800,   0.03,   0.05,  0.01,  0.3,  -1.0,  0.5,   0.05),
  upper = c(5.0,    0.05,   86400,  0.3,    1.5,   0.1,   3.0,   2.0,  10.0,  0.6),
  log   = c(TRUE,   FALSE,  TRUE,   FALSE,  TRUE,  FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE,  FALSE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
files <- list.files("./glue_results")
for(i in 1:length(files)){
  file <- files[i]
  
  raw_glue <- readRDS(paste0("./glue_results/",file))
  screen_glue <- raw_glue[raw_glue$L > 0 & !is.na(raw_glue$L), ]
  
  if(i == 1) alldat <- screen_glue
  if(i > 1) alldat <- rbind(alldat, screen_glue)
}
screen_behav <- alldat

# Tighten to 5th–95th percentile of behavioral sets, with a little padding
pb_focused <- tighten_bounds(param_bounds, screen_behav, prob = c(0.05, 0.95), pad = 1.2)
cat("\nFocused bounds after Stage 1:\n")
print(pb_focused)

# -- Stage 2: Focused GLUE with PA --------------------------------------------
cat("\n============= STAGE 2: FOCUSED GLUE (KGE + PA) =============\n")
Sys.time()
glue_results <- run_glue(
  n_samples    = 300,          # denser sample in reduced space
  param_bounds = pb_focused,
  mdl_template = mdl,
  obs_sim      = obs_sim,
  obs_q        = obs_q,
  pa_obs       = pa_obs,
  outlet_id    = OUTLET_ID,
  n_cores      = 7L,
  seed         = 107L,
  use_pa       = TRUE,
  kge_thresh   = 0.0,           # must beat the mean predictor
  include_sz   = FALSE
)
saveRDS(glue_results, "./glue_PA_acc_results/glue_screen3000_seed104_PA.rds")
tk <- readRDS("./glue_PA_acc_results/glue_screen3000_seed104_PA.rds")
View(tk)
best <- glue_results %>% 
  tibble() %>% 
arrange(desc(kge))
best
index <- which(glue_results$kge == max(glue_results$kge, na.rm = TRUE))
glue_results[which(glue_results$kge == max(glue_results$kge, na.rm = TRUE)),]
#big_best <- best
# =============================================================================
# 10. EVALUATE BEST PARAMETER SET
# =============================================================================
cat("\nTop 10 Stage-2 behavioral runs:\n")
print(head(glue_results[glue_results$L > 0 & !is.na(glue_results$L),
                        c(param_bounds$name, "L", "kge", "csi", "bias")], 10))

best_params <- setNames(as.numeric(glue_results[index, pb_focused$name]), pb_focused$name)
best_sim <- run_model(best_params, mdl, obs_sim,
                      outlet_id  = OUTLET_ID,
                      pa_hru_ids = sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id)),
                      include_sz = FALSE)

# Compose total discharge for plotting
best_q <- best_sim[,"q_out"]


cat("\nBest run evaluation:\n")
cat("KGE :", kge(best_q, obs_q), "\n")
cat("Bias:", bias_ratio(best_q, obs_q), "\n")

pa_best <- csi_presence_absence(best_sim, pa_obs)
if(!is.null(pa_best)){
  cat(sprintf("CSI=%.3f POD=%.3f FAR=%.3f TP=%d FP=%d FN=%d TN=%d\n ACC=%.3f",
              pa_best$CSI, pa_best$POD, pa_best$FAR,
              pa_best$TP, pa_best$FP, pa_best$FN, pa_best$TN, pa_best$accuracy))
}

# -- Discharge plot --
plot(merge(obs_q, best_q),
     main = "Observed vs Simulated discharge [m3/s]",
     legend.loc = "topright",
     ylim = c(0, max(c(as.numeric(obs_q), as.numeric(best_q)), na.rm=TRUE)*1.1),
     col = c("black", "firebrick"))
plot(merge(best_q, obs_q),
     main = "Observed vs Simulated discharge [m3/s]",
     legend.loc = "topright",
     ylim = c(0, max(c(as.numeric(obs_q), as.numeric(best_q)), na.rm=TRUE)*1.1),
     col = c("firebrick", "black"))

# -- Dotty plots for focused run --
#par(mar=c(3,3,3,3))

plot_glue_dotty(tk, pb_focused)

# -- PA site plots --
for(hid in sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id))){
  col_name <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
  if(!col_name %in% names(best_sim)) next
  sim_q <- best_sim[, col_name]
  sub   <- pa_obs[pa_obs$hru_id == hid, ]
  
  t_sim <- index(sim_q)
  ylims <- c(0, max(c(as.numeric(sim_q), FLOW_THRESHOLD*3), na.rm=TRUE))
  xlims <- c(min(pa_obs$datetime), max(all_23$datetime))
  
  plot(t_sim, as.numeric(sim_q), type="l",
       main = paste("HRU", hid, "— simulated q_sf vs observations 2023"),
       ylab = "m3/s", xlab = "", col = "steelblue", ylim = ylims
       ,xlim = xlims
       )
  abline(h = FLOW_THRESHOLD, lty = 2, col = "grey40")
  
  flowing <- sub[sub$observed == 1, ]
  dry     <- sub[sub$observed == 0, ]
  
  if(nrow(flowing) > 0){
    t_f <- sort(unique(as.POSIXct(flowing$datetime, tz="UTC")))
    rect(xleft = head(t_f,-1), xright = tail(t_f,-1),
         ybottom = 0, ytop = par("usr")[4],
         col = adjustcolor("green", 0.15), border = NA)
  }
  if(nrow(dry) > 0){
    t_d <- sort(unique(as.POSIXct(dry$datetime, tz="UTC")))
    rect(xleft = head(t_d,-1), xright = tail(t_d,-1),
         ybottom = 0, ytop = par("usr")[4],
         col = adjustcolor("red", 0.1), border = NA)
  }
  legend("topright",
         legend = c("Simulated q_sf", "Flow threshold", "Obs: flowing", "Obs: dry"),
         col = c("steelblue","grey40", adjustcolor("green",0.4), adjustcolor("red",0.3)),
         lty = c(1,2,NA,NA), pch = c(NA,NA,15,15), cex=0.8)
}

## SUMMER 2024
for(hid in sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id))){
  col_name <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
  if(!col_name %in% names(best_sim)) next
  sim_q <- best_sim[, col_name]
  sub   <- pa_obs[pa_obs$hru_id == hid, ]
  
  t_sim <- index(sim_q)
  ylims <- c(0, max(c(as.numeric(sim_q), FLOW_THRESHOLD*3), na.rm=TRUE))
  xlims <- c(min(all_24$datetime), max(all_24$datetime))
  
  plot(t_sim, as.numeric(sim_q), type="l",
       main = paste("HRU", hid, "— simulated q_sf vs observations 2024"),
       ylab = "m3/s", xlab = "", col = "steelblue", ylim = ylims
       ,xlim = xlims
       )
  abline(h = FLOW_THRESHOLD, lty = 2, col = "grey40")
  
  flowing <- sub[sub$observed == 1, ]
  dry     <- sub[sub$observed == 0, ]
  
  if(nrow(flowing) > 0){
    t_f <- sort(unique(as.POSIXct(flowing$datetime, tz="UTC")))
    rect(xleft = head(t_f,-1), xright = tail(t_f,-1),
         ybottom = 0, ytop = par("usr")[4],
         col = adjustcolor("green", 0.15), border = NA)
  }
  if(nrow(dry) > 0){
    t_d <- sort(unique(as.POSIXct(dry$datetime, tz="UTC")))
    rect(xleft = head(t_d,-1), xright = tail(t_d,-1),
         ybottom = 0, ytop = par("usr")[4],
         col = adjustcolor("red", 0.1), border = NA)
  }
  legend("topright",
         legend = c("Simulated q_sf", "Flow threshold", "Obs: flowing", "Obs: dry"),
         col = c("steelblue","grey40", adjustcolor("green",0.4), adjustcolor("red",0.3)),
         lty = c(1,2,NA,NA), pch = c(NA,NA,15,15), cex=0.8)
}




# -- Uncertainty bounds --
n_behav <- sum(glue_results$L > 0, na.rm=TRUE)
#if(n_behav >= 10){
  bounds <- glue_uncertainty_bounds(best[1:10,], pb_focused,
                                    mdl, obs_sim, obs_q,
                                    outlet_id = OUTLET_ID,
                                    include_sz = FALSE)
  plot_glue_bounds(bounds)

```

```{r}


default_params <- c(t_0=0.135, m=0.040, t_d=28800, s_rzmax=0.1,
                    c_sf=0.3,  n_ch=0.05, v_ch=1.0,
                    T_T=0.0,   C_f=2.5, C_wh=0.1)

test_sim <- run_model(default_params, mdl, obs_sim,
                      outlet_id  = OUTLET_ID,
                      pa_hru_ids = sort(unique(pa_obs$hru_id)))

plot(test_sim[,1])
plot(merge(test_sim[,1], obs_q$Discharge_m3_s),main="Simulated and observed flows",
     legend.loc='topright')

kge(test_sim$q_out, obs_sim)
```

```{r}
test_parms <- data.frame(
  name = param_bounds$name,
  value = c(0.135, # t_0
            0.00698, # m
            8*60*60, # t_d
            0.1, # s_rzmax
            0.5425, #c_sf
            0.05, #n_ch
            1, # v_ch
            0, # T_T
            2.5, # C_f
            0.1 # C_wh
            )
)
test_params <- setNames(
  test_parms$value,
  test_parms$name
)

test_sim <- run_model(test_params, mdl, obs_sim,
                      outlet_id  = OUTLET_ID,
                      pa_hru_ids = integer(0),   # skip PA to keep it clean
                      include_sz = FALSE)

plot(merge(test_sim, obs_sim[,1]))
kge(test_sim[,1], obs_sim)
```


```{r test run model}
# Load previously created data
output_defn <- data.frame(name = c("q_sf", "v_sf_rz"),
                      id = 0,
                      flux = c("s_sf", "v_sf_rz"),
                      scale = c(1, -1/900))
#mdl <- readRDS(file.path(".","dynaGIS","atb_20.rds"))
#obs <- readRDS(file.path(".","processed","obs.rds"))
# initialize dynatop object

## determining the initial recharge rate ad setting it in the model
# I think the same number is the watershed area...
#r0 <- as.numeric(obs[1, "Streamflow"])#/ 86400
#r0 <- as.numeric(obs$Streamflow[1])
 r0 <- as.numeric(obs$Discharge_m3_s[1])#/ sum( sapply( hru, function(x){x$properties["area"]} ) )
hru <- lapply(hru,function(h){h$initialisation["r_uz_sz_0"] <- r0;h})

## the map input is only needed for visualisation
ctch_mdl <- dynatop$new(mdl$hru, map = mdl$map
  )$add_data( obs
  )$initialise(
  )$sim(all_req
  )


# Gauge Flows
sim_gauge <- ctch_mdl$get_output() ## extract the flow as an xts object
head(sim_gauge)
plot(sim_gauge[,1],main="Simulated and observed flows",
     legend.loc='topright')
plot(merge(sim_gauge, obs$Discharge_m3_s),main="Simulated and observed flows",
     legend.loc='topright')


new_mdl <- ctch_mdl$get_model() ## get the model structure from the dynatop object
new_mdl[[1]]

```

# PLOT
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# Figure 1: Spatial map of per-sensor accuracy
# =============================================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)

# ── Compute per-sensor accuracy from best_sim ─────────────────────────────────
compute_sensor_accuracy <- function(best_sim, pa_obs, 
                                    threshold = FLOW_THRESHOLD){
  do.call(rbind, lapply(unique(pa_obs$hru_id), function(hid){
    col_name <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
    if(!col_name %in% names(best_sim)) return(NULL)
    
    sub <- pa_obs[pa_obs$hru_id == hid, ]
    if(nrow(sub) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    sub_xts <- xts(sub$observed,
                   order.by = as.POSIXct(sub$datetime, tz = "UTC"))
    both    <- merge(best_sim[, col_name], sub_xts, join = "inner")
    if(nrow(both) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    sim_bin <- as.integer(as.numeric(both[, 1]) >= threshold)
    obs_bin <- as.integer(as.numeric(both[, 2]))
    valid   <- !is.na(sim_bin) & !is.na(obs_bin)
    sim_bin <- sim_bin[valid]; obs_bin <- obs_bin[valid]
    
    TP <- sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 1L)
    FP <- sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 0L)
    FN <- sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 1L)
    TN <- sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 0L)
    n  <- TP + FP + FN + TN
    
    data.frame(
      hru_id   = hid,
      accuracy = if(n > 0) (TP + TN) / n else NA_real_,
      CSI      = if((TP+FP+FN) > 0) TP / (TP+FP+FN) else NA_real_,
      POD      = if((TP+FN) > 0) TP / (TP+FN) else NA_real_,
      FAR      = if((TP+FP) > 0) FP / (TP+FP) else NA_real_,
      TP=TP, FP=FP, FN=FN, TN=TN, n=n,
      pct_flowing = mean(obs_bin, na.rm=TRUE)
    )
  }))
}

sensor_acc <- compute_sensor_accuracy(best_sim, pa_obs)

locs_df <- as.data.frame(stic_locs, geom = "XY") %>%
  rename(sensor_id = number, lon = x, lat = y) %>%
  group_by(sensor_id) %>%
  #slice(2) %>%          # keep first occurrence — or use summarise(lon=mean(lon), lat=mean(lat))
  ungroup()

spatial_acc <- sensor_hru_key %>%
  left_join(sensor_acc, by = "hru_id") %>%
  left_join(locs_df, by = "sensor_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(accuracy), !is.na(lon)) %>%
  distinct(sensor_id, .keep_all = TRUE)  # belt-and-suspenders dedup

# Join sensor accuracy to spatial locations via sensor_hru_map
# sensor_hru_map has columns: sensor_id, hru_id, hru_name, seg_length, snap_dist
spatial_acc <- 
sensor_hru_key %>%
  left_join(sensor_acc, by = "hru_id") %>%
  left_join(locs_df) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(accuracy), !is.na(lon)) 

# Convert to sf for plotting
spatial_acc_sf <- st_as_sf(spatial_acc,
                            coords = c("lon", "lat"),
                            crs = "EPSG:26919") # adjust to your projection

# Watershed outline and channel for basemap
watershed_sf <- st_as_sf(w3_outline)     # adjust to your outline object
channel_sf   <- st_as_sf(vect_final)

# ── Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = watershed_sf, fill = "grey96", color = "grey60",
          linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_sf(data = channel_sf, color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.5,
          alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_sf(data = spatial_acc_sf,
          aes(fill = accuracy),
          shape = 21, color = "white", stroke = 0.6, size = 6) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette  = "RdYlGn",
    direction = 1,
    limits   = c(0, 1),
    name     = "Accuracy",
    labels   = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  # scale_size_continuous(
  #   name   = "Observations",
  #   range  = c(3, 9),
  #   breaks = c(50, 200, 500, 1000)
  # ) +
  # Label each point with sensor id and accuracy %
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = spatial_acc_sf,
    aes(label = paste0(sensor_id, "\n",
                        scales::percent(accuracy, accuracy = 1)),
        geometry = geometry),
    stat         = "sf_coordinates",
    size         = 2.8,
    label.size   = 0.2,
    label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    box.padding  = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    min.segment.length = 0.3,
    fill         = "white",
    color        = "grey20"
  ) +
  coord_sf() +
  labs(
    title    = "Flow presence/absence accuracy by sensor location",
    subtitle = paste0("Calibration period  ",
                       format(cal_start, "%Y-%m-%d"), " — ",
                       format(cal_end,   "%Y-%m-%d")),
    caption  = paste0("Threshold: ", FLOW_THRESHOLD, " m³/s  |  ",
                       "n = observations per site")
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey50"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid    = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.3)
  )

print(fig1)
ggsave("fig1_spatial_accuracy.png", fig1, scale = 2,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")

# =============================================================================
# Figure 2: Accuracy through time, aligned with hydrograph
# =============================================================================
# Computes a rolling accuracy for each sensor over a sliding window,
# then stacks them in a panel below the hydrograph.


# Hydrograph data
hydro_df <- data.frame(
  datetime = index(obs_q),
  q_obs    = as.numeric(obs_q),
  q_sim    = as.numeric(best_sim[index(obs_q), "q_out"])
) %>%
  filter(datetime >= min(rolling_acc$datetime, na.rm=TRUE),
         datetime <= max(rolling_acc$datetime, na.rm=TRUE))

# ── Panel 1: hydrograph ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_hydro <- ggplot(hydro_df, aes(x = datetime)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = q_obs, color = "Observed"), linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = q_sim, color = "Simulated"), linewidth = 0.5,
            alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = "black",
                                 "Simulated" = "firebrick"),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(suffix = " m³/s",
                                                    accuracy = 0.001)) +
  labs(y = "Discharge", x = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = c(0.85, 0.85),
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x     = element_blank(),
    plot.margin      = margin(t=8, b=0, l=8, r=8)
  )+xlim(c(window1_start, window1_end))

# ── Panel 2: rolling accuracy per sensor, faceted ────────────────────────────

compute_rolling_accuracy <- function(best_sim, pa_obs,
                                     threshold    = FLOW_THRESHOLD,
                                     bin_days     = 14,      # width of each accuracy bin
                                     join_tol_min = 35){     # max minutes to match obs to sim
  
  # ── 1. Convert sim to data frame once — avoid repeated xts indexing ─────────
  sim_df <- data.frame(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(index(best_sim), tz = "UTC"),
    as.data.frame(coredata(best_sim))
  )
  
  # ── 2. Tolerance join: snap each pa_obs row to nearest sim timestep ──────────
  # Uses findInterval — O(n log n), no loops
  tol_secs <- join_tol_min * 60
  
  pa_joined <- pa_obs %>%
    mutate(datetime = as.POSIXct(datetime, tz = "UTC")) %>%
    mutate(
      # Index of nearest sim timestep
      idx = findInterval(as.numeric(datetime),
                         as.numeric(sim_df$datetime)),
      idx = pmax(1L, pmin(idx, nrow(sim_df)))
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      sim_time = sim_df$datetime[idx],
      gap_secs = abs(as.numeric(datetime) - as.numeric(sim_time))
    ) %>%
    filter(gap_secs <= tol_secs) %>%   # drop obs with no nearby sim timestep
    mutate(sim_idx = idx)
  
  cat(sprintf("PA obs matched: %d / %d (tol = %d min)\n",
              nrow(pa_joined), nrow(pa_obs), join_tol_min))
  
  # ── 3. For each HRU, pull simulated values and compute binned accuracy ───────
  all_results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(unique(pa_joined$hru_id), function(hid){
    
    col_name <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
    if(!col_name %in% names(sim_df)) return(NULL)
    
    sub <- pa_joined %>%
      filter(hru_id == hid) %>%
      mutate(
        sim_q   = sim_df[[col_name]][sim_idx],
        sim_bin = as.integer(sim_q >= threshold),
        obs_bin = as.integer(observed),
        # Assign each obs to a calendar bin
        bin_start = as.POSIXct(
          floor(as.numeric(datetime) / (bin_days * 86400)) * (bin_days * 86400),
          origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC"
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(sim_bin), !is.na(obs_bin))
    
    if(nrow(sub) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    # ── 4. Summarise per bin — fully vectorized, no inner loop ─────────────────
    sub %>%
      group_by(hru_id, bin_start) %>%
      summarise(
        TP       = sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 1L),
        FP       = sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 0L),
        FN       = sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 1L),
        TN       = sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 0L),
        n_obs    = n(),
        .groups  = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        accuracy = (TP + TN) / (TP + FP + FN + TN),
        CSI      = ifelse((TP+FP+FN) > 0, TP / (TP+FP+FN), NA_real_),
        POD      = ifelse((TP+FN)    > 0, TP / (TP+FN),    NA_real_),
        datetime = bin_start + (bin_days * 86400 / 2)  # bin midpoint for plotting
      ) %>%
      filter(n_obs >= 3)   # skip bins with too few observations to be meaningful
  }))
  
  all_results
}

# ── Usage ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rolling_acc <- compute_rolling_accuracy(
  best_sim     = best_sim,
  pa_obs       = pa_obs,
  threshold    = FLOW_THRESHOLD,
  bin_days     = 14,       # 2-week bins — reduce to 7 for finer resolution
  join_tol_min = 20        # 20-min tolerance handles both your 10-min and 30-min series
)
# Sort sensors by upstream-to-downstream order (hru_id ascending)
rolling_acc <- rolling_acc %>% 
  left_join(sensor_hru_map %>% select(sensor_id, hru_id),
            by = "hru_id") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("Site ", sensor_id, " (HRU ", hru_id, ")")) %>%  # create first
  mutate(label = fct_reorder(label, hru_id))                              # then reorder


# Tag each row with which period it belongs to
window1_start <- ymd("2023-07-01", tz = "UTC")
window1_end   <- ymd("2023-11-30", tz = "UTC")
window2_start <- as.POSIXct("2024-05-01", tz = "UTC")
window2_end   <- as.POSIXct("2024-07-31", tz = "UTC")
tag_period <- function(df){
  df %>% mutate(
    period = case_when(
      datetime >= window1_start & datetime <= window1_end ~ "Summer–Fall 2023",
      datetime >= window2_start & datetime <= window2_end ~ "Summer 2024",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>% filter(!is.na(period))
}

rolling_acc <- tag_period(rolling_acc)
hydro_df       <- tag_period(hydro_df)

# Then add to both p_hydro and p_acc:
# + facet_wrap(~ period, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1)
# + scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "1 month")

p_acc <- ggplot(rolling_acc, aes(x = datetime, y = accuracy)) +
  # Shaded "good" zone
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=Inf, ymin=0.7, ymax=1,
           fill = "green", alpha = 0.04) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(aes(color = accuracy, group = 1), linewidth = 0.6,
            na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(aes(color = accuracy), size = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_color_distiller(
    palette   = "RdYlGn",
    direction = 1,
    limits    = c(0, 1),
    name      = "Accuracy",
    labels    = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    guide     = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 0.5, barheight = 5)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1)
  ) +
  scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
                   limits = c(window1_start, window1_end)) +
  facet_wrap(~ label, ncol = 1, strip.position = "right") +
  labs(y = paste0("Rolling accuracy\n(", 14, "-day window)"), x = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey40"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    legend.position  = "right",
    plot.margin      = margin(t=0, b=8, l=8, r=8)
  )

# ── Combine with patchwork ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(patchwork)

n_sensors  <- length(unique(rolling_acc$hru_id))
hydro_h    <- 2      # inches for hydrograph panel
sensor_h   <- 0.9   # inches per sensor panel

fig2 <- p_hydro / p_acc +
  plot_layout(
    heights = c(hydro_h, sensor_h * n_sensors)
  ) +
  plot_annotation(
    title   = "Rolling flow presence/absence accuracy through time",
    subtitle = paste0("14-day sliding window  |  threshold = ",
                       FLOW_THRESHOLD, " m³/s"),
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
    )
  )
fig2
print(fig2)
ggsave("fig2_temporal_accuracy.png", fig2,
       width  = 10,
       height = hydro_h + sensor_h * n_sensors + 1.5,
       dpi    = 300, bg = "white")
```

```{r}
compute_rolling_accuracy <- function(best_sim, pa_obs,
                                     threshold    = FLOW_THRESHOLD,
                                     bin_days     = 14,      # width of each accuracy bin
                                     join_tol_min = 20){     # max minutes to match obs to sim
  
  # ── 1. Convert sim to data frame once — avoid repeated xts indexing ─────────
  sim_df <- data.frame(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(index(best_sim), tz = "UTC"),
    as.data.frame(coredata(best_sim))
  )
  
  # ── 2. Tolerance join: snap each pa_obs row to nearest sim timestep ──────────
  # Uses findInterval — O(n log n), no loops
  tol_secs <- join_tol_min * 60
  
  pa_joined <- pa_obs %>%
    mutate(datetime = as.POSIXct(datetime, tz = "UTC")) %>%
    mutate(
      # Index of nearest sim timestep
      idx = findInterval(as.numeric(datetime),
                         as.numeric(sim_df$datetime)),
      idx = pmax(1L, pmin(idx, nrow(sim_df)))
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      sim_time = sim_df$datetime[idx],
      gap_secs = abs(as.numeric(datetime) - as.numeric(sim_time))
    ) %>%
    filter(gap_secs <= tol_secs) %>%   # drop obs with no nearby sim timestep
    mutate(sim_idx = idx)
  
  cat(sprintf("PA obs matched: %d / %d (tol = %d min)\n",
              nrow(pa_joined), nrow(pa_obs), join_tol_min))
  
  # ── 3. For each HRU, pull simulated values and compute binned accuracy ───────
  all_results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(unique(pa_joined$hru_id), function(hid){
    
    col_name <- paste0("q_sf_hru", hid)
    if(!col_name %in% names(sim_df)) return(NULL)
    
    sub <- pa_joined %>%
      filter(hru_id == hid) %>%
      mutate(
        sim_q   = sim_df[[col_name]][sim_idx],
        sim_bin = as.integer(sim_q >= threshold),
        obs_bin = as.integer(observed),
        # Assign each obs to a calendar bin
        bin_start = as.POSIXct(
          floor(as.numeric(datetime) / (bin_days * 86400)) * (bin_days * 86400),
          origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC"
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(sim_bin), !is.na(obs_bin))
    
    if(nrow(sub) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    # ── 4. Summarise per bin — fully vectorized, no inner loop ─────────────────
    sub %>%
      group_by(hru_id, bin_start) %>%
      summarise(
        TP       = sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 1L),
        FP       = sum(sim_bin == 1L & obs_bin == 0L),
        FN       = sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 1L),
        TN       = sum(sim_bin == 0L & obs_bin == 0L),
        n_obs    = n(),
        .groups  = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        accuracy = (TP + TN) / (TP + FP + FN + TN),
        CSI      = ifelse((TP+FP+FN) > 0, TP / (TP+FP+FN), NA_real_),
        POD      = ifelse((TP+FN)    > 0, TP / (TP+FN),    NA_real_),
        datetime = bin_start + (bin_days * 86400 / 2)  # bin midpoint for plotting
      ) %>%
      filter(n_obs >= 3)   # skip bins with too few observations to be meaningful
  }))
  
  all_results
}

# ── Usage ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rolling_acc <- compute_rolling_accuracy(
  best_sim     = best_sim,
  pa_obs       = pa_obs,
  threshold    = FLOW_THRESHOLD,
  bin_days     = 14,       # 2-week bins — reduce to 7 for finer resolution
  join_tol_min = 20        # 20-min tolerance handles both your 10-min and 30-min series
)
```
